Session 27 (2026-05-11): Single production commit 241f943 (tag session-27-close). Three major outcomes: (a) ADR-002 v2 full rewrite ACCEPTED — supersedes v1 (Session 12 2026-04-28); v1 preserved in git history at b46249e and prior; v2 file replaces v1 at docs/decisions/ADR-002-market-structure-philosophy.md (20KB → 44KB). Six v1 principles preserved (P1 zones, P2 force, P3 trapped sellers, P4 velocity, P5 PINNED, P6 DTE multiplier); two new (P7 vol-pricing RR ratio thresholds HIGH>1.2/FAIR/LOW<0.85/COMPRESSED<0.4; P8 second-order Greeks vanna/charm Phase 3). Buyer/Writer inversion named as first-class architectural concept. Positioning Landscape refined to five named scalars (gamma_wall_strike, short_strike_for_strike, gradient_max_strike, hedged_long_cr, lambda_score_pct). Six-scenario dealer-flow grid (±0.5%, ±1%, ±2%). New vol_analytics table SPEC. Methodology specifications mandatory before build. Phase 0 calibration discipline introduced. Phase 3 prerequisites named — four parallel tracks beyond P1-P8. ENH-84 NEW (vol_analytics + RR ratio Phase 0b dependency) + ENH-85 NEW (vanna/charm Phase 3 prep) filed in scope; formal Enhancement Register filing deferred to S28 P2 carry-forward. (b) TD-NEW-2 RESOLVED (flip_level regression S1 acute): Dhan returned spurious gamma=0.00007 at strike 21,250 CE with spot 24,200 starting 2026-05-08 (deep-ITM CE legitimately near-zero gamma; 70× ATM gamma impossible). Latent algorithm fragility surfaced by Dhan response-shape change. Two-part patch via fix_td_new_2_flip_level.py: Part A sanity guard in signed_gamma_exposure() (reject |strike-spot|/spot > 5% AND |gamma| > 5e-5); Part B walk-from-ATM in compute_flip_level() (returns zero-crossing nearest spot; legacy bottom-up fallback preserved). Three edits to compute_gamma_metrics_local.py. Verified HEALTHY 2026-05-07 delta -12pts (no regression); BROKEN 2026-05-08 patched flip 25,060 near spot vs stuck 21,250 live (+3,810pts correction). Honest reframing from smoke test: Part A necessary, Part B hardening for class-of-future-bugs (Part B alone insufficient against this specific bug pattern). (c) TD-NEW-3 RESOLVED (net_gex unit Cr S2 architectural): gamma engine wrote raw rupees since deployment but field semantics implied Cr (10³ too large). Silent because all downstream consumers sign-only (regime classification, expansion probability, structural manipulation gate). Surfaced via Phase 0a §3 sign audit cross-comparison to source-material Cr references. Fix: /1e7 added to signed_gamma_exposure() / signed_gex() in three writer files (compute_gamma_metrics_local.py, replay/replay_compute_gamma_metrics.py, backfill_gamma_metrics.py) via fix_td_new_3_net_gex_unit.py. Verified 2026-05-11 09:30 IST cycle LIVE 775,285,881,741 raw rupees → PATCHED 78,544.84 Cr; ratio 9,870,615 (98.7% of 1e7, within 5% tolerance). Reader codebase audited — zero magnitude thresholds, unit change non-disruptive. Phase 0a §3 sign-convention audit PASS — 25 of 26 sessions verified correct direction (78 SHORT_GAMMA rows on bearish 2026-05-11; 37/76 SHORT on 2026-04-29; 8/149 SHORT on 2026-04-27). Ref 2 source-vs-MERDIAN disagreement traced to LIVE-vs-PROJECTED reader-side categorisation error (source dashboard showed projected dealer-flow scenario for hypothetical -1% spot move, not live state). Sign convention sound. Unblocks ADR-002 v2 ENH-80 (per-strike GEX table) downstream build sequence. Rule 11 + Rule 1 mechanical follow-throughs filed in same session: Decision Index (ADR-002 v2 row prepended above ADR-008 + ADR-002 v1 row annotated [SUPERSEDED by ADR-002 v2]), Assumption Register (new §D.10 with 8 rows D.10.1-D.10.8 + Update log Session 27 row), CLAUDE.md (4 settled-decisions bullets + v1.18 footer with B20 + B21 + 5 ops findings), tech_debt.md (TD-NEW-2 + TD-NEW-3 RESOLVED blocks above TD-101), session_log.md (S27 prepend), CURRENT.md (S26 demoted to Previous session per no-crunch + new This session S28 block), merdian_reference.json (this v18 → v19 update). 4 new code files: fix_td_new_2_flip_level.py, fix_td_new_3_net_gex_unit.py, verify_td_new_2_flip_level.py, verify_td_new_3_net_gex_unit.py. 5 backup files preserved (_PRE_TD-NEW-2.py / _PRE_TD-NEW-3.py chain). TDs CLOSED: 2 (TD-NEW-2, TD-NEW-3 — both NEW+RESOLVED same-session, third + fourth instances of same-session pattern after TD-097 S25 + TD-101 S26). ADRs NEW: 1 (ADR-002 v2). ENH NEW: 2 (ENH-84, ENH-85 — formal Enhancement Register filing P2 S28 carry-forward). Production code patches: 3 files. Commits: 1 (single-commit pattern restored vs S26 anomaly). Tags: 1 (session-27-close). BUGS_LATENT_SURFACED: 2. SIGN_AUDIT: PASS. AWS sync via git pull on i-0e60e4ed9ce20cefb is P0b S28 carry-forward. Backfill of broken-window gamma_metrics rows 2026-05-08 onwards is P1 S28 carry-forward (bundle with ENH-84 vol_analytics initial backfill for cost amortization). Replay TD-NEW-2 Parts A+B parity is P5 S28 carry-forward. Session 26 (2026-05-10): Five production commits in single Sunday session: (1) TD-080 instrumentation commit 718ef39 - new Supabase table dhan_token_probe_log (12 cols) + view v_dhan_token_probe_today; pull_token_from_supabase.py extended 50 to 355 lines with atomic .env write + readback verify + post-write probes of Dhan /v2/marketfeed/ltp + /v2/optionchain/expirylist + audit logging + asymmetry verdict; Sunday smoke PASS 20:28 IST token len=280 both probes 200 OK verdict=OK; AWS cron 5 3 * * 1-5 unchanged; Mon 2026-05-12 verification SQL filed in Topology §9.B. (2) TD-079 commit 0731e67 - patch_s26_td079_zone_validity.py 13 surgical AST-validated replacements implementing ADR-005 Phase α Q1 answer: D/W OB/FVG valid_to=None (price-breach only canonical), 1H OB/FVG valid_to=trade_date+7days (tactical fallback), expire_old_zones() filter widened [W,D] to [W,D,H], PDH/PDL date-expiry unchanged; backfill SQL revived 18 SENSEX W BEAR_OB/BEAR_FVG zones above 78k from EXPIRED to ACTIVE valid_to=NULL; live rebuild 80 zones; Pine 36 to 62 zones (49 HTF + 13 intraday). (3) ENH-88 BULL_FVG cluster gate deploy commit 8407169 - patch_s26_enh88_deploy.py adds ENH88_LOOKBACK_MIN=90 + _has_recent_bull_ob() helper + gate block before return out flags with three-site sync action+trade_allowed+out{}; sets out[raw][enh88_decision]=ALLOW or BLOCK; BEAR-side asymmetry preserved (BEAR_FVG anti-clusters -16.5pp per ENH-90 - do NOT mirror); smoke test Sunday no-data PASS. (4) TD-101 RESOLVED same-session commit 3cb84e2 - patch_s26_td101_ret_session.py replaces build_momentum_features_local.py::get_session_open_spot() unbounded query with bounded query gte(ts, today_start_utc_iso) + limit=20; defense-in-depth date filter preserved; threshold 03:35 UTC preserved per ENH-01/V18G regression history; same OI-18 anti-pattern as S25 TD-097 but writer-side helper that S25 TD-099 grep audit couldn't reach; live impact ENH-55 momentum opposition gate silent no-op for 24 trading days 2026-04-17 to 2026-05-10 ~5000 signals. (5) ENH-55 disabled by env flag commit 5b94c78 - retrospective audit on silent-failure window partitioned actionable signals (action in {BUY_CE,BUY_PE} and trade_allowed=TRUE) into ENH-55-decision buckets: WOULD_HAVE_BLOCKED N=44 79.5% WR (43/44 BUY_PE in up-sessions with ict_pattern=NONE - intraday-rollover-of-up-session-strength exhaustion/mean-reversion signature); WOULD_HAVE_ALIGNED_BONUS N=35 54.3% WR; NEUTRAL_BAND N=1 0% WR; production data on cohort ENH-55 actually gates directionally falsifies Exp 20 hypothesis (sign opposite, 25pp magnitude clears §D.8.3 flag-drift criterion >15pp); ENH55_ENABLED env flag added default OFF reversible via MERDIAN_ENH55_ENABLED=1; both opposition block AND alignment +10 bonus gated together as symmetric claims falsified together; ENH-53 breadth modifier untouched. Plus TD-099 closed as filed-in-error after URL-spy verification (all 4 scripts in scope emit clean URLs; 5th uses supabase Python client different code path; ~3 hours of unnecessary patching avoided; filing rule established: same anti-pattern in N other scripts claims require URL-spy or runtime trace verification before priority assignment). TDs CLOSED: 3 (TD-079 via patch, TD-099 filed-in-error, TD-101 same-session). TDs NEW: 1 (TD-101 same-session NEW+RESOLVED). TDs STATUS UPDATE: 1 (TD-080 instrumentation deployed pending Mon root-cause). ADRs NEW: 0 (ADR-005 P2 S27, ADR-009 P2b S27). ENH NEW+SHIPPED: 1 (ENH-88 BULL_FVG cluster gate). ENH DISABLED (env flag): 1 (ENH-55). HYPOTHESIS FALSIFIED: 1 (Exp 20 ENH-55). New tables: 1 (dhan_token_probe_log) + 1 view (v_dhan_token_probe_today). Commits: 5 (single-commit pattern broken intentionally). Silent-gate-failure window: 24 trading days. Project knowledge upload pending (P0 S27 carry-forward).

Session 24 (2026-05-09): ENH-93 replay/simulation harness built end-to-end across all 5 phases in single session. Phase 1: 10 *_replay Supabase tables via CREATE TABLE LIKE INCLUDING ALL (option_chain_snapshots_replay, market_spot_snapshots_replay, gamma_metrics_replay, volatility_snapshots_replay, momentum_snapshots_replay, market_state_snapshots_replay, ict_zones_replay, signal_snapshots_replay, options_flow_snapshots_replay, script_execution_log_replay) + replay/replay_clock.py with 12/12 self-tests + out-of-hours hard guard 08:00-16:30 IST weekdays. Phase 2: replay_chain_reconstructor.py (~600 lines) with TD-087 5h30m subtract on read for option bars + TD-094 OI lift from live option_chain_snapshots per ±150s match window; 4 bugs fixed during build (ISODOW vs Python weekday, PostgREST timestamp normalization, TD-087, TD-094). Phase 3: 7 replay scripts mirror live counterparts with mechanical changes (argparse named args, _replay table reads/writes, replay_clock for time, replay_execution_log for audit); ALL gates preserved exactly (ENH-53/55/76/77/78, DTE, VIX-elevated, power-hour using replay_ts.astimezone(IST).hour, LONG_GAMMA, NO_FLIP, signal_v4); live scripts physically untouched per ADR-008 zero-touch constraint. Phase 4: replay_runner_for_date.py orchestrator with file lock + OOH guard + TRUNCATE 9 _replay tables (preserves script_execution_log_replay audit) + reconstruct + 76 boundaries × 2 symbols × 7 scripts in V19 §5.2 order PER BOUNDARY (critical contract; not script-by-script across boundaries). Phase 4b 2026-05-07 full-day run: 1056/1064 invocations (99.2%) succeeded in 5009s (~83 min); per-script gamma 144/152, volatility 147/152, momentum 152/152, market_state 152/152, ICT 152/152, options_flow 150/152, signal 152/152; 8 failures all explainable (boundary 15:30 reconstruction-skipped, 6 SENSEX OI-gap windows, 1 cascade). Phase 5 validation: NIFTY 100% gamma_regime + 68% direction-bias match with live; SENSEX 91% action match (mostly DO_NOTHING tautology) + 28% gamma_regime match (structural narrow-strike-base divergence: 11 strikes × 100-pt SENSEX step covers ±500pts vs live full chain ~482 strikes); both trade_allowed=true count 0 because 2026-05-07 was LONG_GAMMA / NO_FLIP day per ENH-35. ADR-008 written + Doc Protocol v4 Rule 11 closure: Decision Index ADR-008 row prepended; CLAUDE.md settled-decisions one-liner appended; Assumption Register NOT updated (replay-vs-live divergences are properties of data sources not catalogued assumptions); ADR-008 contains canonical 'What what-if experiment means' methodology section (5-step mechanic: baseline replay → snapshot → modify one signal-logic file → re-run → SQL diff). 4 TDs filed: TD-087 (S2, hist_option_bars_1m IST-as-UTC 5h30m phantom offset; reconstructor compensation working), TD-094 (S2, hist_option_bars_1m.oi=0 from S22 Kite backfill; reconstructor OI lift compensation working), TD-095 (S3, atm_iv_avg unit ambiguity replay-discovered applies to live; Kelly potentially mis-sizing), TD-096 (S4, reconstructor skips boundary 15:30 because last hist bar at 15:29; cosmetic). ENH-95 CANDIDATE filed (in-process orchestrator optimization estimated 65min → 10-15min; deferred until first what-if experiment campaign demonstrates need). ENH-93 CANDIDATE → CLOSED via ADR-008 acceptance. Net new code: ~3,500 lines across 11 new replay/* files + 1 SQL migration. Net new schema: 10 new Supabase tables. Zero production code changes. Zero writes to live tables throughout. Live scripts touched: ZERO. CARRY_FORWARD_TO_S25: project knowledge upload Claude.ai UI; S21 patches still uncommitted; TD-080 Dhan token reliability; ADR-005 zone validity (TD-079); ADR-006 AWS migration scope; first what-if experiment when operator selects production-candidate change; ENH-95 deferred; patchy-day stress test deferred.

Session 21 (2026-05-06): TD-070 + TD-071 + TD-072 RESOLVED via patch deployment (3 patch scripts using v3 patch canon: read_bytes+utf-8-sig, normalize CRLF→LF, ast.parse validate, idempotency guard, write_bytes preserve LF); TD-070 v1 (8-week unbreached-anchor lookback in detect_weekly_zones replacing single-bar prior_move<0 check) + TD-070 v2 dedup fix (after live deploy crashed Postgres 21000 'cannot affect row a second time' on upsert ON CONFLICT — added _dedup_zones_by_conflict_key collapsing matching conflict keys keeping earliest valid_from); TD-071 (expire_old_zones rewrite + pipeline reorder detect→upsert→recheck→expire); TD-072 (8 Task Scheduler tasks battery flags via PowerShell); verification rebuild 18:33 IST: NIFTY 37 W zones + SENSEX 39 W zones = 78 total, 0 ON CONFLICT errors, 18 stale W zones flipped EXPIRED; TDs FILED: TD-073 HIGH (momentum direction lagged 700pt rally May 6 by ~60 min), TD-074 MED (ENH-77 BULL_OB AFTERNOON NIFTY hard skip blocked the only TIER1 signal), TD-075 MED (confidence threshold 60 vs observed max 45), TD-076 LOW (SENSEX DTE gate persistent block on weekly expiry), TD-077 LOW (wide FVG zones during volatile weeks lack outlier filter), TD-078 PENDING (TD-070 closure verification incomplete — Apr-13 BULL_OB SQL not run); session NOT documented at session-end (rectified retroactively in Session 22 closeout)

Session 22 (2026-05-07): MAJOR INCIDENT Dhan option chain ingest outage on AWS — 151 of 299 attempts failed with 401 Authentication Failed (alternating 50/50 hourly-stable across two windows 09:30-13:30 IST + 14:45-15:25 IST, ~70% degradation of trading day, 64 missing 5-min option_chain_snapshots windows). Same Dhan token: capture_spot_1m_v2 succeeded 371/378 (97%). Six hypotheses tested and refuted (token sync silent failure, TD-072 battery flag side-effect, AWS refresh_dhan_token competing writer, MeridianAlpha competing for Dhan tokens, long-running stale-token daemon, shadow_runner stale token in memory). Most likely remaining hypothesis: Dhan-side rate limiting on option chain endpoint or per-token instability with the 08:24-issued token. Filed as TD-080 HIGH. Architecture conversation Phase α initiated, 4 questions outstanding (zone validity model / AWS migration scope / token reliability ordering / today's session shape). TD-079 HIGH discovered (zone date-expiry valid_to=week_end+4weeks discards unbreached resistances above current spot — Pine overlay visually missing all >78k W BEAR_OB/BEAR_FVG, ICT canon says zones live until price closes through them not date-expire). TD-081 HIGH (no data-freshness guard between primary ingestion and derived layers — signal builder produces signals on stale data without warning). TD-082 (contract miscalibration on ingest_option_chain_local.py backfill spike of 482 writes vs expected 50 logged as success). TD-083 LOW (ExecutionLog rejects OUTSIDE_MARKET_HOURS and NO_DATA exit_reasons from capture_spot_1m_v2 — false-alarm Telegram). TD-084 RESOLVED same-session (backfill_option_zerodha_OI_FIXED UTC/IST timezone bug — line 184 .replace(tzinfo=ZoneInfo('UTC')).astimezone(IST) shifts IST-tagged Kite timestamps +5h30m, dropping 88% of bars; sed-fixed; 46 → 375 bars/strike post-fix). BACKFILL EXECUTED via MeridianAlpha Kite gateway: spot 750 NIFTY+SENSEX rows, option 24,749 rows (NIFTY 8,250 = 22 strikes × 1 expiry May-12 Tuesday weekly + SENSEX 16,499 = 44 strikes × 2 expiries May-7 today-expiring + May-14 next Thursday weekly). NIFTY weekly expiry now Tuesday per NSE 2025+ change; SENSEX stays Thursday weekly per BSE. ENH-93 CANDIDATE filed (replay/simulation harness exact mimic of live runner cycle for outside-market-hours testing per V18G § 7.2 6-step pipeline). 0 production patches deployed Session 22 (all data recovery + diagnosis + documentation). Session 21 + Session 22 documented retroactively in this closeout.

operational_findings: Minimum-sufficient-statistic at write layer is the canonical schema design pattern when derivations are regime-conditional — ADR-014→ADR-015 same-session supersession surfaced that derived booleans `is_local_max`/`is_flip_zone`/`is_pin_candidate_bool` fire on 39%/20% of rows producing marker noise indiscriminable from signal; derivations belong in SQL views like `v_gex_strike_pin_zone`, write layer stores only what cannot be recomputed from raw inputs; generalizes beyond GEX schema to any case where a column's value depends on a relative-to-cohort threshold

IV skew evidence is material and must be preserved in schema — at NIFTY 24050 ATM `gamma_call=0.00164` vs `gamma_put=0.00234` = +43% PE-richer = put-skew regime; collapsing to single `gamma` column destroys this signal; `gamma_call`/`gamma_put` split costs one column but preserves regime classification capability

Same-session ADR supersession is a valid pattern when quant review surfaces architectural defect post smoke-fire — ADR-014 was technically correct (fidelity OK, sign convention OK) but functionally noisy; v1 patch trail + backup preserved for git audit, live schema migrated to v2 via TRUNCATE + ALTER before any consumer code locked against v1; supersession in same session is preferable to shipping v1 + planning v2 because there are no consumers yet to migrate

GEX-as-context-not-gate framing — operator's explicit 'Meridian doesn't need anymore gates. It's already gating everything' rejection of gate-mode integration is settled architectural decision per ADR-002 v2 P5/P7 + ADR-009 graduated-strictness holdout; ENH-80/81 ship as display layer only (Lovable dashboard + Pine overlay) not as routing inputs to `build_trade_signal_local.py`; operator is the integration layer for GEX-derived decisions; this framing inverts the assumption that every new signal becomes a gate — research-grade columns and views earn their place by informing operator judgment, not by silently routing trades

Calibration-deferred-by-design pattern — ADR-016 parameter calibration pattern PROPOSED but build deferred per operator until N grows enough for cohort-driven recalibration to be useful; ENH-81 views ship with hardcoded τ_pin=τ_accel=0.3 and inline `// TAU_PIN — swap for ENH-83 lookup` markers at every site for the future plumbing point; the marker pattern is the discipline that prevents τ from drifting into magic-number territory while keeping the calibration build queued

Pine v6 visual disambiguation patterns — label anchor points at zone edges (`style_label_lower_left` for top-anchor, `style_label_upper_left` for bottom-anchor) + `bar_index+90` X-offset for X-position separation prevent collision with ICT-layer labels at midpoint; single-strike PIN zone degeneracy resolved via ±0.1% of strike widening with 50pt floor — generalizable to any Pine box rendering of empirically-degenerate ranges; SENSEX 77000 single-strike PIN renders as 154pt band labeled 'PIN 77000 (single strike, +56K Cr)' with honest framing

Lovable per-table RLS pattern — anon-read access via three-line canonical pattern `ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY` + `CREATE POLICY ... FOR SELECT TO anon USING (true)` + `GRANT SELECT ... TO anon` is the canonical per table/view; brittleness surfaced in TD-S37-03 — Lovable client uses anon-key directly so any RLS misconfiguration silently produces empty datasets instead of explicit auth failure; mitigation is explicit policy + grant pair per object, no implicit defaults; document the exact RLS triplet inline in commit message

operational_findings: D.18.1 writer-state-vs-data-state diagnosis ordering — foundational methodology rule for any derived-table integrity investigation. When an aggregate-magnitude metric drifts, read the writer function body BEFORE inferring from aggregate magnitudes; aggregate magnitudes are downstream of both live-writer state and historical-data unit-mix, and aggregate evidence alone cannot discriminate between live regression and historical contamination. Reverse-order diagnosis (aggregate → live-writer-blame → action) is a known failure mode that cost 7 sessions of carry-forward on TD-S30-CANDIDATE-1.

D.18.2 capture-layer Mode A/B/C failure-shape taxonomy — every capture/ingest service has token / quota / orphan axes. Mode B (token 401) was SOLVED upstream at S29 (zero post-S29 401s in 11 instrumented days); Mode A (429 quota) is the recurring failure mode; Mode C (orphan RUNNING) is the silent third axis never reaped. Generalizable as 'instrument the failure log before extending the retry layer' pattern. The 'extend the retry budget' reflex would have burned ~12s per non-429 transient and not addressed Modes B or C.

D.18.3 PostgREST `Prefer: return=representation` interacts with RLS on PATCH path differently than read path. Header is safe to include on read-back patterns but unsafe to default-include on PATCH against RLS-protected tables when not consuming the response body. Drop the header on raw-HTTP PATCH paths.

D.18.4 `script_execution_log.duration_ms` is int4 — orphan-recovery durations exceeding `2^31 - 1 = 2,147,483,647 ms` (~24.85 days) must be clamped at write time, not at compute time after the fact. Pattern: `age_ms = min(int((now - started_at).total_seconds() * 1000), 2_147_483_647)`. Applies to any writer computing a duration delta against an old TIMESTAMPTZ.

House DB convention for Local Supabase access is raw HTTP via `requests` against `{SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/*` with `apikey` + `Authorization: Bearer` + `Content-Type: application/json` headers (`SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` env var), not supabase-py `create_client`. Reference implementation: `ingest_option_chain_local.py`. Supabase-py package may not even be installed.

Multi-modal failure-shape diagnosis pattern — for any capture/ingest service that exhibits a recurring failure pattern, partition the failure surface against `script_execution_log` (or equivalent telemetry table) by (exit_reason, error_message, error_code) before scoping the remediation. Modes that turn out to be upstream-resolved (Mode B in this case) should be DROPPED from current-session scope to avoid masking re-regression.

Patch script discipline: regex-anchor pattern `def function_name\(.*?raise ExceptionClass\([^)]*\)` with `re.DOTALL` flag is the canonical fallback when literal first-N-char anchors fail on CRLF/LF EOL straddle or deeper-body mismatch. v1 → v2 → v3 iteration cost ~3 turns; abandoning v1 at dry-run failure (rather than committing the partial INGEST+JANITOR success without RETRY_UTILS) preserved atomic commit semantics.

`MERDIAN_Orphan_Janitor` Task Scheduler registration follows the 19-task S29 convention bit-identically: Hidden=$true + MultipleInstances=IgnoreNew + ExecutionTimeLimit=5min + battery flags + Interactive Limited principal + direct `pythonw.exe orphan_run_janitor.py` action (no `.bat` wrapper). Weekly Mon-Fri 09:14 IST cadence chosen 6 min before the 09:20 first Dhan ingest cycle to clear any RUNNING rows from prior day's outages before today's runners begin writing.

Mode B (token 401) is SOLVED upstream at S29 via `pull_token_from_supabase.py` evolution (S26 instrumentation + S29 atomic-write + readback + Dhan endpoint probes + `dhan_token_probe_log` audit). 11 instrumented days of zero 401 incidents is the empirical foundation. A retry-layer 401 handler at this point would mask token re-regression and is intentionally NOT included in ENH-99 Component 1's `is_dhan_429` predicate.

operational_findings: Capture and selection are distinct problems with distinct solutions — capture-rate ≥99% indicates the structural foundation is sound; selection-research is the next-layer build, not a capture-layer fix

The retest is structurally the moment of maximum local risk for an ICT trade — once survived in the first 5-15 minutes (i.e., spot does not close back through the zone), the trade is what it is — structural pricing

Premium SL on ATM held strikes is the wrong instrument-stop pairing — ATM held strikes wick 5-15% in first 30-60 min from bid-ask + theta on tight DTE + IV crush as morning gamma compresses; wick noise uncorrelated with thesis validity; wider premium SLs (Compendium-era 30%+) approximate the right intent indirectly but couple SL hit rate to volatility regime/expiry distance/bid-ask unrelated to structural premise

Vendor-purchased data and self-ingested data sit in different tiers — transitions between them create silent coverage gaps in downstream consumers; first diagnostic when backfill cohort suddenly stops at a calendar boundary is 'what tier of data lives on each side of the boundary?' not 'what failed?'

Prior research stands when cohort definition becomes more restrictive — a smaller-than-expected N is not evidence prior research is wrong; it may be evidence prior research measured a different (correctly-defined) cohort and the current definition is more restrictive

Operator domain-knowledge pushback continues to be the highest-bandwidth bug surface — S33 source-table category error + S34 sparse-data framing + S34 token-vs-tier-transition framing all caught within one cycle by operator pushback (B17 hypothesis-exhaustion rule applied across S33+S34)

Governance: ATM PnL across horizons is computed from the chain table hist_option_bars_1m with manually-picked ATM strike (NIFTY/50, SENSEX/100) held constant — never via vendor's pre-picked atm_strike in hist_atm_option_bars_5m. key_findings: Source-table fitness-for-purpose is a category error class — hist_atm_option_bars_5m was designed for wick-reversal analysis (read by experiment_26/27/27b), NOT for held-strike PnL across horizons. Same-strike enforcement against the aggregated table filters 50-70% of primitives where vendor rolled ATM — non-random self-selection against winners.

Experiments 1-50 made the inverse error (no same-strike check on rolling-ATM source → inflated coverage but mathematically wrong — comparing premiums of two different vendor-picked strikes is not tradeable PnL).
Operator-prompted source-table challenge surfaced the real bug — 'sparse vendor data' framing was wrong; architectural error diagnosed within one push-back cycle.
Per-tuple range-prefetch is canonical pattern for chain reads at scale — group I/O by tuple, amortize query overhead.
Empirical expiry calendar beats DOW rules — NSE/BSE 2025-09-01 weekday swap + ~15% holiday-shifted weeks + same-week double expiries defeat any pure DOW formula.
Median PnL universally negative on a cell with 80%+ spot WR is a source-table smell, not an edge property — investigate before concluding 'no edge'.
M5 OB retest is FALSIFIED at option-PnL level — D.14.3 promoted from investigation-queued to falsified. Trade M5 OBs at formation only.
DTE 3-bucket structure: DTE=0 feast-or-famine (exit at 30m mandatory on DOWN-direction); DTE=1-2 sweet spot for M5; DTE≥3 home for H-TF DISPLACEMENT.

ADR-009 §Phase 1 H-FVG retest finding empirically confirmed cross-symbol with held-strike option PnL — D.14.1 strengthened from spot-WR-only to spot-WR + option-PnL (two independent metrics agreeing).
D-TF cells positive spot WR ~67% but negative option PnL median at 30m/60m — theta drains before spot move materializes; hypothesis D-TF needs horizons longer than 60m (TD-S33-NEW-4).

fix_td_new_13_microsecond_normalize.py.purpose: Patch script for TD-NEW-13 — extends _dte_from_ts() helper with regex normalization padding/truncating microsecond fraction to exactly 6 digits before fromisoformat() call. Pattern: r'\.(\d+)([+-]\d{2}:\d{2})?$' — matches microsecond + optional timezone offset tail; group 1 is microsecond digits; pad with zeros to 6 if shorter, truncate to 6 if longer; reassemble. Cross-Python 3.10 (AWS) + 3.12 (Local) compatibility: 3.10 accepts only 3 or 6-digit microseconds; 3.12 permissive. Supabase serializes PostgreSQL timestamps with variable microsecond precision 2-7 digits.
fix_td_new_13_microsecond_normalize.py.status: EXECUTED Session 28, commit 447634c. Same canonical patch pattern. Cross-version tested: pattern works on Python 3.10 + 3.12 identically. Retry on 60 failed run_ids post-patch: 60/60 success.

exit_reason='DATA_ERROR' (not 'ORPHANED') because chk_exit_reason_valid CHECK constraint closed set excludes 'ORPHANED' literal; notes='ORPHAN_RECOVERED:' prefix makes daily audit grep-discoverable

C-08.title: latest_market_breadth_intraday stale  --  writer targeting view instead of underlying table
C-08.root_cause: Commit 4599bb8 (2026-04-16) retired ingest_breadth_intraday_local.py and introduced ingest_breadth_from_ticks.py. New writer upserts to latest_market_breadth_intraday which is a VIEW of market_breadth_intraday; Supabase silently ignores upserts to views. market_breadth_intraday stopped receiving rows at 2026-04-16 05:08:48 UTC. Signal engine read stale BEARISH data all day 2026-04-17 despite actual BULLISH market (1,269 ADV / 50 DEC).
C-08.fix_applied: ingest_breadth_from_ticks.py: changed .table('latest_market_breadth_intraday').upsert(payload, on_conflict='universe_id') to .table('market_breadth_intraday').upsert(payload, on_conflict='ts,universe_id'). View auto-reflects latest row via ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1.
C-08.verification: Saturday 2026-04-19: direct upsert test passed; test row with universe_id=excel_v1 appeared in view within 30 seconds; cleanup confirmed. View refresh semantics proven end-to-end.
C-08.v18h_audit_note: V18H_v2 proposed DDL (DROP VIEW; CREATE TABLE with symbol PRIMARY KEY and 6 columns) was based on incomplete diagnosis. V18H_v2 did not query the view definition or last-write timestamp of the underlying table. Correct fix was one line of Python, not a schema change. Audit-process lesson: verify actual write-path against underlying object, not just consumer symptom.

TD-044.summary: ENH-76/77 local var / out{} dict drift -- gate decisions never propagated to headline DB-write fields. Three-site sync. Side effect: file line endings normalised to CRLF.

TD-045.summary: script_execution_log.script_version column missing -- PGRST204 warning on detect_po3_session_bias. Non-blocking.

TD-046.summary: build_ict_htf_zones.py reports contract violation when no new zones to write -- false-alarm Telegram alerts on idempotent reruns and pre-market windows. ~15 line fix.

TD-047.summary: ict_zones and ict_htf_zones are two separate tables with different schemas. ict_zones=BULL_FVG only with trade_date/detected_at_ts. ict_htf_zones=structural zones (OB/PDH/PDL/W) with valid_from/valid_to. Architectural separation needs documentation; consolidation is multi-session.

TD-048.summary: BEAR_FVG missing across detector pipeline -- 13-month silent bug. hist_pattern_signals contained 0 BEAR_FVG signals over 13 months despite 1,129 canonical BEAR-FVG 3-bar shapes in hist_spot_bars_5m (60d alone) and 46-50% of recent sessions being bear-direction days. Root cause: zone builders had no BEAR_FVG branch in detect_weekly_zones (only BULL_FVG); detect_daily_zones had no FVG of either direction; detect_1h_zones (live builder) had only BULL_FVG. Three locations in two scripts. Signal builder build_hist_pattern_signals_5m.py was direction-symmetric and innocent. Fix: S1.a + S1.b + S15-1H patches shipped to both zone builders; full historical backfill (40,384 rows); live run (85 rows); signal rebuild via existing direction-symmetric writer; BEAR_FVG count 0 -> 795. End-to-end re-verified via diagnostic_bear_fvg_audit.py.

TD-049.summary: D-OB detector uses non-standard ICT definition. detect_daily_zones() marks the move bar K+1 itself as the OB; standard ICT defines OB as the LAST opposing-color candle BEFORE the displacement (bar K, not K+1). W-OB uses standard ICT def; D-OB does not. Inconsistent across timeframes. Symptom: D BEAR_OB candidates fire ~6 expected per manual replay vs 1-2 actual = false negatives at standard ICT criterion. Consolidates 'TD-S2.a' working name from Session 15 closeout. Decision required: (a) re-run full historical backfill after definition fix, or (b) ship for new detections only and document version boundary.
TD-049.see_also: tech_debt.md TD-049 entry; consolidates expanded TD-031

TD-050.summary: D-zone non-FVG validity = exactly 1 day (valid_from = valid_to = target_date). D-OB + D PDH/PDL zones effectively expire by next session. ADR-003 Phase 1 v2 saw 0 D zones in 10-day lookback because each D zone's valid_to < lookback_start_date. Same root pattern as previously-documented H-zone single-day-validity bug. D-FVG zones got 5-day validity in Session 15 S1.b patch (D_FVG_VALID_DAYS=5); D-OB + D PDH/PDL still 1-day. Decision: (a) extend D-zone non-FVG validity to N days, or (b) document 1-day as intentional and adjust downstream consumers.

TD-051.summary: PDH/PDL +/-20 band hardcoded, symbol-agnostic. NIFTY at ~24,000 -> 20pt = ~0.083%. SENSEX at ~80,000 -> 20pt = ~0.025%. SENSEX PDH/PDL zones are 3.2x narrower in % terms. 1H session-high/low uses +/-10 (separate constant, even more asymmetric). Proper fix: replace with +/- (level * BAND_PCT) per timeframe. Audit downstream consumers (TIER assignment, APPROACH_PCT interactions) before patching.

TD-052.summary: Zone status workflow on hist_ict_htf_zones is write-once, never-recompute (historical builder only — live builder is correct: recheck_breached_zones updates status). ADR-003 Phase 1 v2 filtered on status='ACTIVE' and the filter was a no-op (every historical zone is ACTIVE). Total post-Session-15-backfill = 40,384 rows = 100% ACTIVE. By design — preserves no-lookahead audit invariant — but undocumented. Proper fix: either (a) add separate historical_zone_status_at(zone_id, as_of_date) view, or (b) document that status field on hist_ict_htf_zones is meaningless.

TD-053.discovered: 2026-05-01 (Session 15, ADR-003 Phase 1 v2 + Exp 44 + bar-coverage diagnostics)
TD-053.summary: CLAUDE.md Rule 16 needs era-aware addendum (post-04-07 era). Rule 16 says: apply replace(tzinfo=None) to bar_ts and filter to in-session 09:15-15:30. Correct for pre-04-07 era only. Post-04-07 bars stored as true UTC; verbatim Rule 16 drops most of the day (~9 bars vs ~76 per session = false alarm 27.5% bar coverage). Era boundary: 2026-04-07. Workaround: pre-04-07 use replace(tzinfo=None); post-04-07 use astimezone(IST_TZ). Codified as Rule 20 in CLAUDE.md v1.10 (Session 15 close). Audit pending for repo scripts that apply Rule 16 verbatim.
TD-053.see_also: tech_debt.md TD-053 entry; CLAUDE.md Rule 20 (Session 15 codification)

TD-054.summary: hist_pattern_signals.ret_60m column is uniformly 0 across every row. Verified in Exp 47b output and Exp 50 output. Either column is never populated by signal builder, or upstream hist_market_state.ret_60m source is empty. Workaround: use ret_30m (TD-039) or compute 60m forward returns directly from hist_spot_bars_5m. Proper fix: diagnose source population, patch builder if needed, backfill via signal rebuild.

TD-055.summary: hist_pattern_signals.ret_eod column does not exist on the table. EOD-outcome experiments must JOIN to hist_spot_bars_5m and compute session-end forward return per row. Coordinate fix with TD-039 (ret_30m naming convention — recommended new column name 'ret_eod_pct' to match unit-explicit convention).
TD-055.see_also: tech_debt.md TD-055 entry; coordinate with TD-039

TD-056.summary: Signal builder bull-skew vs canonical shape symmetry. After Session 15 BEAR_FVG fix, NIFTY 60d signals: BULL_FVG 274 vs BEAR_FVG 150 (1.83x bull skew). SENSEX 60d: BULL_FVG 263 vs BEAR_FVG 208 (1.26x bull skew). Canonical 5m BEAR_FVG / BULL_FVG shapes in hist_spot_bars_5m are essentially symmetric (NIFTY 562 BEAR / 587 BULL). Asymmetry must come from signal builder's filter logic. Suspected: APPROACH_PCT filter favors BULL zones above-spot in uptrending market. Investigation: partition 60d data by regime and recompute ratio per regime; if inverts in down-regimes, filter is regime-driven and correct; if stays bull-skewed, real asymmetry bug.
TD-056.see_also: tech_debt.md TD-056 entry; Session 16 Candidate B

governance_rules.run_id_vs_symbol_contract: compute_gamma_metrics_local.py and compute_volatility_metrics_local.py take run_id (UUID), NOT symbol. build_momentum_features_local.py, build_market_state_snapshot_local.py, build_trade_signal_local.py take symbol (NIFTY/SENSEX). Never swap these.
governance_rules.stdout_run_id_api_contract: ingest_option_chain_local.py emits 'Run ID: <uuid>' to stdout on success. Both local and AWS runners parse this exact string. Format is an API contract  --  do not change the prefix without updating runner parse logic.
governance_rules.runner_alive_ne_system_valid: Runner appearing alive does NOT mean system is valid. DB-dependent steps (WCB) can succeed while API-dependent steps (option ingest) fail 401. Confirmed V18A. Health checks must verify table recency, not just process existence.
governance_rules.trading_calendar_is_hard_gate: Missing trading_calendar row = authoritative skip for ALL calendar-gated scripts. Not a soft warning. Maintain 1 week ahead at all times.
governance_rules.premarket_anchor: 09:08 IST snapshot only. 09:00-09:07 premarket stream discarded by design.
governance_rules.close_anchor: 4:00 PM weighted close is the session close anchor. NOT 3:30 PM last tick.
governance_rules.threshold_governance: No confidence threshold changes until signal_regret_log has 30+ sessions of DO_NOTHING outcome data. ABSOLUTE GATE. Clock started V18A (614 rows).
governance_rules.measure_validate_shadow_promote: No change to any live signal file until (1) measurement gaps closed, (2) evidence collected, (3) shadow runs 2+ weeks at or above live accuracy, (4) model change log entry written.
governance_rules.full_file_replacement_only: Promote full file replacements only. No hand-patched partial snippets in deployment flow.
governance_rules.aws_env_load: set -a; . ./.env; set +a  --  canonical pattern for loading .env on AWS. Verify with echo $SUPABASE_URL after loading.
governance_rules.aws_cron_install: NEVER use interactive crontab -e. ALWAYS use temp-file non-interactive install. Save snapshot after every change: crontab -l > logs/aws_crontab_snapshot.txt
governance_rules.no_direct_aws_edits: Edit in Local only. AWS is deploy target. Emergency AWS edits (BREAK_GLASS only) must be copied to Local and committed to Git same session.
governance_rules.db_over_logs: DB is truth. Logs are secondary evidence. Health checks and validation must query tables (MAX(created_at), COUNT(*)) not parse log lines.
governance_rules.vwap_field_name: Coverage field in weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots is active_weight_pct NOT weight_coverage_pct.
governance_rules.no_trade_date_in_option_chain: option_chain_snapshots has no trade_date column. Always use WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE or ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'.
governance_rules.shadow_v3_not_v2: shadow_signal_snapshots_v2 was NEVER created. All shadow signal queries must target shadow_signal_snapshots_v3.
governance_rules.subprocess_encoding: ALL subprocess.run() calls that spawn Python scripts MUST use CHILD_ENV = {**os.environ, "PYTHONIOENCODING":"utf-8", "PYTHONUTF8":"1"}. Without this, INR symbol (\u20b9) causes UnicodeEncodeError on Windows cp1252 consoles. Established V18F.
governance_rules.no_powershell_set_content_on_python: NEVER use PowerShell Set-Content to edit Python files. Encoding artifacts are silently introduced. Use text editors or Python fix_*.py scripts only. Established V18F after run_all_experiments_overnight.py and build_ict_htf_zones.py were corrupted.
governance_rules.no_python_c_multiline: NEVER use python -c for multi-line string replacement involving quotes. PowerShell backslash escaping conflicts with Python string parsing causing SyntaxError. Always write a fix_*.py file, copy to project, run as python fix_X.py. Established V18F.
governance_rules.t30m_exit_final: T+30m exit is the confirmed final exit for all ICT patterns. Experiment 15 Section 7: T+30m +INR 10,43,976 (63.8% WR) vs ICT structure break +INR 7,37,341 (36.9% WR). No further exit experiments. Established V18F.
governance_rules.futures_permanently_closed: Futures experiments are permanently closed. Options only. Experiment 2b: options beat futures on every pattern/DTE combination. BEAR_OB DTE=0/1 exception uses combined structure (futures + CE insurance), not pure futures. Established V18F.
governance_rules.capital_ceiling: Live trading capital ceiling: INR 50L hard cap, INR 25L sizing freeze, INR 2L floor. Lots stop growing at INR 25L. No lot calculation uses more than INR 50L equivalent. Implemented via effective_sizing_capital() function. Final. Established V18F.
governance_rules.kelly_sizing_strategy: Start live with Half Kelly (Strategy C). Upgrade to Full Kelly (Strategy D) after 3-6 months experience. Kelly fractions: TIER1=50%/100%, TIER2=40%/80%, TIER3=20%/40% (Half/Full). Established V18F. Validated by Experiment 16.
governance_rules.ict_1h_zone_confirmed: 1H zones (MEDIUM context) are confirmed to add edge and must remain in ENH-37 hierarchy. Experiment 15: MEDIUM 77.3% WR vs HIGH 46.7%. BULL_OB inside 1H zone avg +INR 18,938 vs +INR 9,774 without. Do not remove 1H layer. Established V18F.
governance_rules.1m_bars_execution_only: 1m bars (hist_spot_bars_1m, hist_option_bars_1m) are EXECUTION GRANULARITY ONLY. All ICT pattern detection (OBs, FVGs, sweeps, CHoCH) MUST operate on 5m bars (hist_spot_bars_5m). 1m bars are only used for precise entry after HTF pattern is confirmed. Established Research Sessions 4-5 (2026-04-17).
governance_rules.patch_script_syntax_validation: All fix_*.py patch scripts MUST end with ast.parse() validation before writing the target file. If SyntaxError: print error and sys.exit(1)  --  do NOT write a broken file. Incident: force_wire_breadth.py wrote invalid indent 2026-04-16, IndentationError discovered at market open 2026-04-17. Established Research Session 4 (2026-04-17).
governance_rules.no_new_oi_register: OpenItems Register permanently closed 2026-04-15. Do not create new RESEARCH-OI-N, OI-N (beyond legacy), or similar open-item prefixes. governance_rules.numbering_convention: ENH: monotonic integers in Enhancement Register, pick next-free, never reuse (REJECTED items keep ID as rejection record). C-N: critical fixes only, tracked in merdian_reference.json open_items. No new OI-* prefixes -- OpenItems Register closed 2026-04-15.

governance_rules.ret_30m_percentage_points: hist_pattern_signals.ret_30m is stored as PERCENTAGE POINTS not decimal fraction. Example: 0.1351 means 0.1351%, NOT 13.51%. Divide by 100 before multiplying by spot to get point move. Confirmed Session 11 Exp 41B. RULE 14.
governance_rules.supabase_1000_row_cap: Supabase REST API hard-caps at 1000 rows per request. ALWAYS use page_size=1000 and paginate with .range(offset, offset+999) when fetching potentially large tables. Never assume a single request returns all rows. RULE 15.
governance_rules.bar_ts_tz_workaround: hist_spot_bars_5m and hist_spot_bars_1m bar_ts is stored as IST time labeled as +00:00 (incorrect UTC label). Use replace(tzinfo=None) to strip the incorrect timezone label before comparing with actual IST times. Do NOT use astimezone(IST) -- it will shift by 5h30m. RULE 16.
governance_rules.no_is_pre_market_column: hist_spot_bars_5m has no is_pre_market column. Filter pre-market bars by time: bar_ts.time() < time(9,15). Do not query for is_pre_market -- column does not exist. Confirmed Session 11.
governance_rules.adr_002_market_structure_philosophy: Six architectural principles govern all gamma engine design decisions. P1: markets are zones not points -- every structural feature has a width, not just a level. P2: direction is minimum viable information, force (dealer Cr flow) is the actual edge. P3: know where sellers panic -- the flip zone is where short-gamma writers face cascading hedge requirements. P4: the regime has velocity not just position -- max gamma migration and GEX velocity are signals. P5: local context beats aggregate signal -- local GEX cluster around spot may be positive even when net GEX is negative (PINNED regime, Exp 23 required to define threshold). P6: DTE is a force multiplier not a risk flag -- same GEX at DTE=1 vs DTE=5 is categorically different. See docs/decisions/ADR-002-market-structure-philosophy.md. Established Session 12 (2026-04-28).
governance_rules.capital_scaling_roadmap: MERDIAN strategy evolves in three phases: Phase 1 (current) = directional naked options buying, capacity ceiling ~25,000 lots before market impact. Phase 2 = debit spreads when approaching capacity ceiling. Phase 3 = defined-risk selling (credit spreads, NOT naked shorts) -- requires full P1-P5 ADR-002 implementation first. Do not attempt Phase 3 until gex_strike_snapshots is live and Experiment 23 is validated. Established Session 12 (2026-04-28).

rule_17_market_spot_session_markers_colu.rule: market_spot_session_markers.open_0915 does not exist in production. Live column is open_0915_ts. Never query this table for open price or gap data. Derive open_0915 from market_spot_snapshots first OPEN-window tick. Derive gap_open_pct from hist_spot_bars_5m prev_close.

session_log.summary: Began as 'run four PROPOSED Session 14 EOD experiments' (Exp 44 inverted hammer cascade, Exp 47 direction stability anchor, Exp 49 Apr-only Exp 15 replication, ADR-003 Phase 1 zone respect-rate). Pivoted to discovery + end-to-end fix of a 13-month-old production detector defect (BEAR_FVG missing from hist_pattern_signals). Phase 1 — pending experiments: Exp 47 INVALID (tautological by construction); Exp 44 FAIL (no cell hit WR>=70 + N>=30); ADR-003 Phase 1 v1/v2 INVALID (script-side TZ-handling bug — Rule 16 applied verbatim to post-04-07 era); Exp 47b FALSIFIED ENH-85 'slower anchor' path (ret_30m_back flips 213% MORE than ret_session); Exp 49 DEFERRED (source script has zero ISO date strings AND zero datetime() constructors, regex auto-patch impossible). Phase 2 — Exp 50 surfaces upstream bug: FVG-on-OB cluster vs standalone ICT PD Array test, 1/9 cells PASS, monotonic INVERSION of ICT prediction. DISCOVERED hist_pattern_signals contains 1,261 BULL_FVG and 0 BEAR_FVG over 13 months. Operator challenged as impossible per market structure. Phase 3 — five-step audit conclusive: 1,129 canonical BEAR_FVG 3-bar shapes in 5m bars over 60d but 0 BEAR_FVG signals; H1 (detector-side asymmetry) confirmed. Phase 4 — six-bug code review: S1.a + S1.b fixed; S2.a/S2.b/S3.a/S3.b filed as TD-049-052. Phase 5 — patches shipped end-to-end: build_ict_htf_zones_historical.py + build_ict_htf_zones.py both PATCHED in place (originals preserved as _PRE_S15.py); full historical backfill 40,384 rows; live builder 85 rows; signal rebuild 6,318 -> 7,484 rows; **BEAR_FVG 0 -> 795** (the headline). Filed: TD-048 (CLOSED), TD-049 (D-OB non-standard ICT def), TD-050 (D-zone 1-day validity), TD-051 (PDH/PDL +/-20pt hardcoded), TD-052 (zone status write-once-never-recompute), TD-053 (CLAUDE.md Rule 16 era-aware addendum needed; codified as Rule 20), TD-054 (ret_60m uniformly 0), TD-055 (ret_eod column absent), TD-056 (signal builder bull-skew investigation). TD-031 EXPANDED (D-FVG portion CLOSED via TD-048; D-OB portion remains as TD-049). Six experiments registered with verdicts. ADR-003 Phase 1 v3 plan filed for Session 16+. Carry-forward: re-run Exp 50 / Exp 50b on now-symmetric data; investigate TD-056 bull-skew; Phase 1 v3 with era-aware Rule 16; address TD-049-052 zone-builder bugs.

Research-only session (no production patches). Began as 'execute the seven Session 15 carry-forward items' (Exp 41/41b BEAR_FVG cohort re-derive, stash adjudication, Exp 50 v2 bidirectional, Exp 50b v2 velocity, ADR-003 Phase 1 v3, TD-056 bull-skew partition, Exp 44 v2 if time). Pivoted mid-session to deep audit of Exp 15 framework provenance and live-cohort replication after wrong-cohort overreach. Phase 1 carry-forward execution on hist_pattern_signals (5m batch): Item 1 Exp 41 BEAR_FVG re-derive — N=787, pooled WR 49.9% spot-side T+30m, EV ≈ 0; locally-computed forward return revealed ret_30m column has only 4.7% (24/509) agreement with truth, 35.3% NULL — TD-054 expanded. Item 2 stash adjudication — operator pasted fix_bear_fvg_detection.py docstring claiming 'N=225, 11.5% WR, -30.7% expectancy' but these numbers do not appear in MERDIAN_Experiment_Compendium_v1.md; stash dropped, detection edits 1/2/3/5 catalogued for Session 17. Item 3 Exp 50 v2 (FVG-on-OB cluster bidirectional 3×3×2=18 cells, dropped EV-ratio per session prompt) — N=2274 enriched, BULL 2/9 PASS at 60min/0.50% and 60min/1.00%, BEAR 0/9 PASS, headline cell BULL +8.3pp BEAR -4.2pp; Session 15 'monotonic inversion' was column-noise artefact. Item 4 Exp 50b v2 velocity reframed to 'does velocity moderate cluster WR symmetrically' — BULL 7/7 INCREASING, BEAR mixed but N-weighted INCREASING; carry-forward to Session 17 because Section 18 of analyzer tested clustering on live cohort but not velocity quartiles. Item 5 ADR-003 Phase 1 v3 — six fixes (query hist_ict_htf_zones, drop valid_to filter take most-recent-ACTIVE, era-aware Rule 20, trade_date column, EXPECTED_BARS=81, distance histogram); 40384 zones match Session 15 backfill; aggregate respect 75.8% FUNCTIONAL but 84.3% pivots inside zones (wide-zone tautology). Item 6 TD-056 bull-skew partition — every regime including DOWN shows BULL bias on hist_pattern_signals: NIFTY DOWN 5.60x, SENSEX DOWN 2.30x — REGIME-INDEPENDENT, detector-driven not regime-driven. Item 7 Exp 44 v2 SKIPPED. Phase 2 wrong-cohort overreach: drafted 'framework headlines collapse' synthesis comparing Exp 15 published 94.4% BEAR_OB / 86.4% BULL_OB to hist_pattern_signals 48.9% / 48.0%; operator pushed back ('are we looking at exp code or just compendium results?'); pulled experiment_15_pure_ict_compounding.py source (857 lines, Apr-13 commit c78b6ea per git log --follow), confirmed it reads hist_spot_bars_1m directly, runs live ICTDetector per bar, computes outcome as option premium gain in INR from hist_option_bars_1m (not spot direction); none of Items 1-6 were testing this cohort. Phase 3 Exp 15 provenance archaeology: only execution log of the script on disk is 2026-04-11 21:40:35 (427 bytes, SyntaxError crash at import); Compendium entry dated 2026-04-12; no successful execution log exists in C:\GammaEnginePython\logs\ for this exact script. Critical git diff: c78b6ea silently relabeled MTF tier semantics in detect_ict_patterns.py.get_mtf_context — pre-Apr-13 HIGH=W, MEDIUM=D; post-Apr-13 VERY_HIGH=W, HIGH=D, MEDIUM=H. Apr-12 Compendium uses post-Apr-13 vocabulary to describe pre-Apr-13 measurements. Phase 4 live-detector full-year replication: smoke test (slicing dates [100:110]) verified script runs end-to-end with PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 after Session 15 fix; full run NIFTY 264 sessions 127 trades ₹2L→₹5,60,705 (+180.4%, max DD 1.3%), SENSEX 263 sessions 104 trades ₹2L→₹6,12,737 (+206.4%, max DD 3.1%), combined ₹4L→₹11,73,442 (+193.4%); per-pattern T+30m: BEAR_OB N=25 WR 92.0% ₹+364,273, BULL_OB N=49 WR 83.7% ₹+379,016, BULL_FVG N=155 WR 50.3% ₹+30,153 — Compendium headlines replicate within 2-3pp. MTF deep-dive: BULL_OB|HIGH 71.4% (N=7), BULL_OB|MEDIUM 81.8% (N=11), **BULL_OB|LOW 87.1% (N=31)**; BEAR_OB|HIGH 71.4% (N=7), BEAR_OB|LOW 100% (N=17) — LOW context outperforms HIGH on OB patterns, ENH-37 thesis inverted. Phase 5 deep-audit analyzer (analyze_exp15_trades.py Sections 9-18 reading 231-trade CSV): Section 9 Wilson 95% CIs — BULL_OB [71.0,91.5] BEAR_OB [75.0,97.8] both clear 50%, BULL_FVG [42.5,58.1] spans 50% statistical coin flip; Section 10 per-cell — BEAR_OB|LOW 100% [81.6,100] (N=17), BULL_OB|LOW 87.1% [71.1,94.9] (N=31), BULL_OB|MEDIUM 81.8% [52.3,94.9] (N=11) all clear CI > 50%; Section 11 P&L concentration — top 1 = 29.2% (Feb 1 2026), top 4 = 50%, **top 7 sessions (12.3% of trading sessions) = 80% of P&L** — strategy is event-dependent; Section 12 H1/H2 — BULL_OB STABLE (84.6/82.6), BEAR_OB drift (71.4/100), BULL_FVG UNSTABLE (53.3/46.2); Section 13 per-symbol — both produce edge, NIFTY pooled 65.1% [56.4,72.8] SENSEX 58.3% [48.6,67.3]; Section 14 time-of-day — AFTERNOON 49% (coin flip) vs OTHER 65.6% [58.4,72.1] — ENH-64 BEAR_OB AFTERNOON skip empirically warranted; Section 15 monthly — 9/12 positive, worst Dec-2025 -₹9,544; Section 16 verdict EDGE PRESENT BUT NARROWER THAN HEADLINE; Section 17 TD-056 live-cohort — NIFTY DOWN 23 BULL_OB / 7 BEAR_OB = 3.29x bull-skew, SENSEX DOWN 1.50x — STRUCTURAL ACROSS BOTH CODE PATHS, plus BULL_FVG/BEAR_FVG ratio infinite in all regimes (live detect_ict_patterns.py emits ZERO BEAR_FVG signals across full year despite Session 15 zone-builder fix — TD-058 filed); Section 18 FVG-on-OB clustering — BULL_FVG clustered (90-min N=64) WR 57.8% vs standalone (N=91) 45.1% = +12.8pp lift, 60-min +6.4pp (N=57), 30-min +1.0pp (N=49) — cluster effect replicates and stronger on live cohort. 5 of 7 carry-forward items closed (Items 1, 2, 3, 5, 6); 2 deferred (Item 4 velocity, Item 7 Exp 44 v2). Filed: TD-056 EXPANDED (S3→S2, both code paths); TD-057 NEW (Exp 15 framework provenance gap); TD-058 NEW (live BEAR_FVG emission missing — S2); TD-059 NEW (MTF hierarchy inverted — S2); TD-054 owner check-in updated. ENH-87 NEW (hist_pattern_signals deprecation review); ENH-88 NEW (BULL_FVG production routing requires recent BULL_OB context, +12.8pp lift evidence); ENH-89 NEW (MTF hierarchy redesign or removal). CLAUDE.md v1.11: Rule 21 (always Tee-Object long-running scripts) + B11 (wrong-cohort comparison anti-pattern) + B12 (silent code drift between publication and audit) + 6 operational findings (schema-first queries, confidence intervals before victory, trade-list CSV dump pattern, live-detector replay pattern, read script before conclusions, hist_pattern_signals deprecation candidate). Carry-forward to Session 17: Priority A TD-058 BEAR_FVG live emission fix; Priority B ENH-88 BULL_FVG production routing; Priority C TD-056 bull-skew mechanism investigation. Lower priority: TD-059/ENH-89 MTF redesign, Exp 50b velocity on live cohort, TD-054/ENH-87 hist_pattern_signals deprecation. AWS not touched. Operator live trading context: April 2026 ₹2L→~₹4.6L (2.3x) using hybrid TV-MERDIAN + discretionary; backtest validates pattern identification is correct, hold-time discipline is the operational gap not signal accuracy; live MERDIAN automation deferred 2-3 sessions pending Session 17/18 fixes.

research_findings._note: Key validated findings from Experiments 2-16 and Session 11 (Exp 34-41B). Full detail in MERDIAN_Experiment_Compendium_v1.md.
research_findings.MOM_YES: Strongest single filter. Experiment 20 (5m): momentum alignment +22.6pp lift. ALIGNED=60.9% WR (N=2138), OPPOSED=38.3% WR (N=2275), NEUTRAL=47.6% (N=311). Consistent across BEAR_OB, BULL_OB, BULL_FVG. ENH-44: implement as hard gate (not just confidence modifier). Alignment: BUY_PE + ret_session<-0.05% = aligned; BUY_CE + ret_session>+0.05% = aligned.
research_findings.breadth_independence: Experiment 25 (5m): breadth_regime WR spread = 1.0pp across BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL. Pure noise. BEAR_OB performs BETTER on BULLISH days (51.0% vs 45.0% BEARISH). Breadth gate is wrong  --  remove as hard gate (ENH-43). Keep as confidence modifier +/-5pts only.
research_findings.long_gamma_gate: Experiments 17 + 19 (5m): LONG_GAMMA gate confirmed symmetric. BEAR_OB LONG_GAMMA = 49.7% WR, BULL_OB LONG_GAMMA = 50.5% WR  --  both coin flips. No asymmetry. Current symmetric block correct for all patterns. Today's live trade was discretionary SWEEP_REVERSAL not BULL_OB zone entry.
research_findings.oi_wall_ict_independence: Experiment 18: OI walls and ICT zones are statistically independent. CE wall ICT lift = +4.5pp (noise). PE wall ICT lift = -2.1pp (negative). OI synthesis signal rejected.
research_findings.sweep_reversal_no_edge: Experiments 23/23b/23c: Sweep reversal has NO mechanical edge. Naked = 17.8% WR, with W zone confluence = 19.5% WR, with quality filters = 33.3% (N=3, insufficient). Pattern requires unmitigated zone tracking + 5m/15m wick quality + discretionary CHoCH judgment. ENH-54 sweep reversal mode REJECTED.
research_findings.premium_small_sweep: Experiment 27b: ATM PE premium small sweep (0.2-1.0% above prior high, close back below, morning only) = 64.5% WR (N=107). CE + NO_FLIP = 68.4% WR (N=57). Premium sweep is MOMENTUM-INDEPENDENT (unlike spot ICT which needs alignment). ENH-45 PROPOSED  --  monitor 50 live occurrences before building.
research_findings.5m_bars_canonical: All ICT experiments must use 5m bars for pattern detection. 1m bar experiments produce unreliable results  --  wick quality, sweep detection, and displacement are all noise on 1m. Exp 23c confirmed: wick quality on 1m = 0% WR (wrong timeframe). Established Research Sessions 4-5.

Exp_28_LONG_GAMMA_decile_accuracy.verdict: BUCKET-DEPENDENT. Gate correct ~90% (deciles 1-9 ~50% direction split). Mis-calibrated on 8 (date,symbol) pairs across 5 trading dates with cleanly directional EOD moves > 0.5%.
Exp_28_LONG_GAMMA_decile_accuracy.next_step: Exp 28b (forward-feature discrimination) -- ran same session, see below.

Exp_28b_forward_feature_discrimination.verdict: PROMISING but UNDERPOWERED. or_range_pct >= 0.55% catches 8/14 DIRECTIONAL with 0/10 false positives on cleaned NOISE set (N=24 total). Other features (iv_skew, atm_iv_avg, breadth_score, gap_pct) do not discriminate.
Exp_28b_forward_feature_discrimination.discriminator: or_range_pct = (max_high - min_low) / open across 09:15-09:29 IST 5m bars
Exp_28b_forward_feature_discrimination.next_step: Out-of-sample validation against wider historical window. If clean -> ENH-46 design spec. If breaks -> close as no-action.

_meta.purpose: 10 *_replay Supabase tables created Session 24 (2026-05-09) for ENH-93 replay/simulation harness. All via CREATE TABLE LIKE <live_table> INCLUDING ALL — schema parity with live, separate row spaces. No views, no triggers. TRUNCATEd at start of every full-day replay orchestrator run except script_execution_log_replay which accumulates as audit. Replay code may READ from immutable historical reference live tables per ADR-008 (instruments, hist_spot_bars_1m, hist_option_bars_1m, india_vix_daily, option_chain_snapshots OI lift only, market_breadth_intraday, weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots, ict_htf_zones, po3_session_state, capital_tracker) but MUST NOT WRITE to any live table — constraint is structural (replay scripts only address *_replay table names) not a runtime check.

option_chain_snapshots_replay.purpose: Reconstructed chain rows from hist_option_bars_1m + Black-Scholes IV + OI lifted from live option_chain_snapshots per TD-094 (±150s match window)

market_spot_snapshots_replay.purpose: Reconstructed spot rows from hist_spot_bars_1m at 5-min boundaries

gamma_metrics_replay.purpose: Replay gamma compute output (regime, gamma_zone, flip_level, net_gex, straddle_atm)

volatility_snapshots_replay.purpose: Replay volatility compute output; VIX sourced from india_vix_daily historical close (replaces live fetch_india_vix() network call)

momentum_snapshots_replay.purpose: Replay momentum features (ret_5m/15m/30m/60m/session, vwap_slope, atm_straddle_change, momentum_regime). 5-min vs 1-min spot granularity vs live is a documented divergence per ADR-008.

market_state_snapshots_replay.purpose: Replay 6-component JSONB state (gamma_features + breadth_features + volatility_features + momentum_features + wcb_features + spot/expiry context)

ict_zones_replay.purpose: Replay ICT pattern detection output (intraday zones with breach status + Kelly tier lots). Requires orchestrator boundary sequence to reproduce live behavior — single-boundary ad-hoc invocations under-detect because patterns whose anchor bar is outside 30-bar lookback are missed.

signal_snapshots_replay.purpose: Replay signal-builder output — apex of pipeline; this is the what-if comparison target. Per ADR-008 'What what-if experiment means', baseline replay snapshot is preserved (CTAS or CSV) before modified-code re-run, then SQL-diffed.
